---
title: "Weeding out the rogues: How to identify them and why it matters for VAA-generated datasets"
author: "Djouvas, C., Gemenis, K., and Mendez, F."
date: 2014-01-01
description: "European Consortium for Political Research (ECPR 2014)"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
